name: /spec emitted tests are red on commit and CI surfaces the red state explicitly via runner output
command: mkdir -p tests profiles && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/spec.sh" "feature x" --profile profiles/p.yaml --tests-out tests --feature-id feat-x 2>err.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/runner.sh" --tests-dir tests --feature feat-x 2>out.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'red_tests=' out.txt && grep -q 'feature=feat-x' out.txt && echo red 1>&2
